creator: knowtree@aloha.com
text:
LyX relies on the convert program that is a part of ImageMagick to manipulate images for viewing on-screen. Recommend /usr/ports/graphics/ImageMagick be built during LyX build.

See http://wiki.lyx.org/LyX/FiguresInLyX

Fix: 

Sorry, I don't know how to specifiy dependencies.
